prestazioni: Engine swap to Toyota 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbocharged inline-6 diesel (engine code: 1HD-FTE) with a custom BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, upgraded fuel system featuring Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and 1000cc Denso injectors, paired with a PWR Performance intercooler and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 5-inch muffler for optimized turbo spool and exhaust flow.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (specifically valved for the FJ40 chassis), reinforced polybushings from SuperPro, and a custom-fabricated front sway bar from Whiteline to reduce body roll during high-speed off-road maneuvers.

Drivetrain upgrade including a Toyota J80 Land Cruiser transfer case (NVG247) with 4.88:1 gearing, ARB Air Locker front and rear differentials, and a custom driveshaft from Tom Wood’s Custom Driveshafts to handle increased torque and off-road stress.
estetica: Custom fiberglass front fenders from a Brazilian FJ40 specialist (Bandeirante-specific) to accommodate 35-inch BF Goodrich KM3 tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +12 offset), with a custom rear bumper from Old Man Emu featuring integrated recovery points and a swing-out tire carrier.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SRD bucket seats (FJ40-specific mounting brackets), a custom roll cage from 4x4 Labs with integrated harness bar, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub for improved driver control.

Exterior livery inspired by the original Brazilian military Bandeirante, featuring a matte olive drab paint job with hand-painted military-style stencils, a custom front grille with LED light bar from Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro), and a functional snorkel from Safari Snorkels for deep-water fording.
